summary: Experts largely agree that antimicrobial prescribing should follow standardized, guideline-driven practices rooted in evidence-based medicine, with a focus on combating antibiotic resistance and promoting coordinated care through established frameworks like those from IDSA and antimicrobial stewardship initiatives. This shared emphasis reflects broad consensus among clinicians regarding optimal antimicrobial utilization.
